overall.description: A samurai character walks through a vast field of white flowers under a starry night sky, approaching a massive gnarled tree on a rocky outcrop. The footage is from a video game (Ghost of Tsushima), featuring cinematic third-person camera work and atmospheric moonlighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: white flower meadow under starry sky

events.description: red prayer banners become visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: samurai walking steadily through the dense white flower field toward a distant landmark

entered.detail: dense field of white flowers covering the ground in all directions
snow-capped mountain peak visible on the horizon
massive twisted tree with bare branches on a rocky outcrop
dark blue sky filled with stars and scattered clouds

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through a vast meadow of white flowers under a starry night sky. A distant snow-capped mountain is visible on the right, while a massive gnarled tree stands as a landmark ahead. Red prayer banners appear on the left as the character progresses through the field.

events.description: ground transitions from flower field to rocky terrain
full moon becomes visible behind the gnarled tree branches

agents.ego_description: samurai ascending the rocky path toward the base of the massive tree

entered.detail: dark rocky ground with scattered stones and patches of grass
scattered wooden stakes and posts sticking from the ground
bright full moon partially obscured by clouds

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the flower field and steps onto rocky terrain scattered with wooden posts. The massive gnarled tree looms larger as the samurai approaches its base. The full moon becomes visible behind the tree's twisted branches, creating a dramatic silhouette against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a luminous floral meadow that transitions into a stark, rocky ascent toward a monumental tree. It begins with the samurai walking through a vast field of white flowers under a starry night sky, passing red prayer banners with a snow-capped mountain visible in the distance. As the character progresses, the soft meadow gives way to rugged rocky terrain scattered with wooden posts. The scene then shifts focus toward the massive gnarled tree looming ahead, drawing the camera closer to its base. Finally, the perspective aligns so that the full moon emerges behind the twisted branches, casting the ancient tree into a dramatic silhouette against the dark sky.
